# Beaconing cadence via time bucketing (bin _time)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Detect steady-interval C2 by bucketing time and counting connections per process/destination per bucket. `bin _time span = 1m` is a STANDALONE STAGE (never `alter x = bin(...)`) that rewrites `_time` to the bucket start; `comp ... by ..., _time` then aggregates per bucket. A process+IP pair with a near-constant count across consecutive buckets is beaconing. Widen `span` (5m/1h) for slower beacons.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null
| bin _time span = 1m
| comp count() as c by actor_process_image_name, action_remote_ip, _time
| sort desc c
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
